title: Tandem International Multilingual School
text: Multilingual Education In a positive and dynamic learning climate SIGN UP HERE READY FOR SEK A+ AND GYMI? REGISTER NOW NEW: Campus Küsnacht Since August 2025, our new campus in Küsnacht has united primary school and Gymnasium pupils in a modern learning environment. With inspiring rooms and a seamless transition concept, we optimally prepare pupils for their Matura in small classes. Nestled in nature, the campus offers a place where learning feels personal and purposeful. get more infos WELCOME TO TANDEM INTERNATIONAL MULTILINGUAL SCHOOL Each of our schools offer full day educational programmes and care. KüsnachtGymnasium & 5-6th grade learn more ZurichEarly Years to Primary learn more ZollikonEarly Years & Pre-School learn more ErlenbachEarly Years & Pre-School learn more 2004 SchoolFounded 300+ Pupils On Roll 30 Pupil Nationalities 100% Gymi Pass Rate 100% DELF Prim Pass Rate 12 Staff Nationalities 50% Native German Speakers 25% Native English Speakers 3 School Locations 0 to 4 Early Years Pre-School 4 to 6 Kindergarten 6 to 12 Primary 50% Continue to Gymi 12 After School Clubs 7 Holiday Camps 90 Staff Members DISCOVER THE WORLD THROUGH LANGUAGES! Tandem IMS is a dynamic day school, offering high-quality multilingual education (German, English and French) in a warm and child-friendly environment where both local Swiss and international families are welcome. Our unique multilingual concept accompanies children from early childhood all the way to the Swiss Matura. All pupils engage in translanguaging, seamlessly incorporating German, English and French into their learning experience, supported by two native language teachers working together in the same classroom. In addition, our enquiry-based learning curriculum, based on the Primary Years Programme of the International Baccalaureate (IB) ensures a stimulating, creative and thought-provoking multidimensional education. WHY TANDEM IMS? Our goal is to give your child the best education to be fit for the future. We support every child in reaching their full potential and in developing strong learning strategies – preparing them step by step either for the Swiss Matura at our own Gymnasium or for the educational pathway that best suits their individual strengths. Please also look at our statistics regarding staff stability, contact time with teachers as well as qualified teaching staff per class. Multilingual English and German are spoken in our nurseries. As of kindergarten, French will be part of the multilingual education. Learn More Translanguaging Our teachers create a positive multilingual environment, enabling children to develop their full linguistic repertoire. Learn More Enquiry-Based Learning Encouraging children to ask questions, do research and find answers - based on the International Baccalaureate (IB). Learn More Curricula The core of our curriculum is canton Zurich’s curriculum (Lehrplan 21) and the UK National Curriculum. Learn More Assessments To ensure your child’s progress, we provide a variety of assessments as i.e. Swiss Klassencockpit and UK SATs. Learn More Gymnasium Preparation We support every child in reaching their highest potential and prepare them optimally for the Swiss Gymi exam. Learn More WHAT PARENTS SAY ABOUT OUR SCHOOLS Our daughter Milla started in Kindergarten 1 and finished in grade 6. We are so thankful to all the teachers, management and administration for the great work they do with the children. Tandem IMS offers a friendly environment and the warmth of a family. Milla had a lot of fun but she also learned a lot. She is not only academically strong in English and German and advanced in French but she developed as an individual who loves and respects people, who is independent and confident, who is free to express her opinion, who knows how to organize her daily life and work under pressure. As she said in her graduation speech: «Here in Tandem I had the best time of my life! I am looking forward to the future because I know I am well prepared for the next step of my life.» Our son Philip attended Tandem from Primary 1 through 6. What convinced us of this school were the multilingual education, the enquiry-based learning approach, and the excellent after-school care programme. The teachers we met over the years were all highly qualified and very motivated. The community spirit at the school is exceptional: fifth graders play with first graders, mixed age groups at Sports Day, and loyal alumni to the school. Philip also attended the preparation course for the Gymi exam offered at Tandem. The level of detailed preparation by his teacher was outstanding. It was integrated seamlessly into the school routine. The learning journey at Tandem gave Philip a head start for his secondary education. I can highly recommend Tandem to all families looking for a multilingual primary education. Our experience at Tandem Erlenbach has been wonderful and totally recommendable. Sara has been happy at Tandem IMS Erlenbach each and every day of the almost three years she has spent there. Tandem's educational method allows each child to progress in an individual and personalised way, but at the same time creates strong bonds with the rest of the children in each group. The diverse atmosphere and the values of Tandem IMS (tolerance, team spirit, kindness, respect…) are something that all schools should promote and that we truly appreciated. Neven started in Kiga 1 and stayed until the end of Primary 6, a total of 8 years. He is a very active and lively boy. All the different teachers he had at Tandem IMS were able to motivate and interest him through all these years. They recognised his strengths and supported him when needed. Neven successfully passed the Gymiprüfung and also in Gymnasium it shows how well he is prepared for learning in a demanding environment. As we’re both working parents we always felt understood and supported by Tandem IMS. If we would start again with a younger child we would choose Tandem IMS agai
